reviews.review_msg: Annette stenning I believe she was hurt in her childhood or something becoz the readings she made you read are very depressing !!! A women hurt by love thats why she would let you read all the bad books! Don't be brainwashed by Annette while she telling you that you are stupid because you can't read Heart of Darkness! Get a life Annette!

The worst teacher I've ever seen. She does not really use too much materials to explain but just follows her mind. I got a lower mark in my midterm1 and the class average was not high which was around C no higher than B-. She forces students to answer her question otherwise she will get mad at students and start to judge students.
She has her own criterion and won't explain that to you. It means you never know how you fail this course. Probably the worst teacher Ive ever met. Though she is a nice person.

Very helpful especially during office hours. Gives very good feedback. need to be a good presenter and study hard. Hardly teaches anything in class. Will make you do a lot of team work and project, email assignment. She will make you work for the marks. Tough grader indeed. Get ready to study on your own. Got a B though had to work for it.

She is approchable. Tough grader indeed. Please be prepared to read on your own if you take her course. As she will make you do a lot of group work . emails etc. please be good in presentation. and participation and attendence matters!

The grades are horrible, i feel like everyone is getting a C or C minus The ones who worked so hard only got a B- while the ones who literately did nothing get C-, that's hilarious. I feel like shes going to draw a horizontal line other than a curve with our grades

Very disappointed in Annette's quality of instruction. She does not like like to teach  - revealing she "was doing her time" as a requirement. Wow Annette - really - your terrible attitude goes against everything Hussey & Kehler stand for! Definitely a waste of MY time. Shame on you.

Annette does not enjoying teaching (She told us this was a mandatory step for her to get her PHD). Picks Favourites. Judges her students. Will not help you get a better mark even when you ask and put in the time - just assumes you should know how to write exactly like her. Hussey  & Kehler are a better investment of your time & money.
Annette Stenning is a professor I highly recommend. She's actually a nice person, unaffected, compassionate and very approachable.
